I purchased this item two months ago, and the spinner stopped working two months to the day. This would be the perfect washer if only the spinner worked. It works good but your only able to wash a half of a load at a time, and spin dry half of that. Washes, and spinner broke within a month.
rust_corrosion: I purchased this March 2020 because of COVID and living in an apartment with shared laundry space. The product lasted until September 2020 until the bottom rusted out HOWEVER it was due to me not being able to drain the washing machine without water coming underneath it in my tub. I expected this to last about 6-8 months and I’ve liked the item so far. For reference, I used this item almost daily

physical_breakage: I used this 4 times and the plastic in the basin has a huge hole in it and the plastic on the spinner is splintering. I've only used it for underwear and T- shirts. The spinner has never worked well, but the wash was fine. If the plastic wasn't so cheap that it broke down in less than a week, I would have no issue with the actual cleaning function of the machine. I put in a request to return.

wont_power_on: the washer worked fine.  i used it 4 times a month.  but the electrical cord at the base had a sudden short in power cord.  it does not turn on.  I have taken very good care of this washer. it is defective.
Won’t power on after only 5 uses. Seller refuses to grant the 3 year warranty, and instead offered me $5 off a new one. Much better portable washers out there.
Worked great for three weeks, then stopped working completely. Neither the washer or dryer work - it acts like it's unplugged, even though it is plugged in and getting power.
control_failure:
I have used it three times so far. It is doing a good job at cleaning my clothes, even better than the washer that is on my apartment building. It is more time consuming. I do suggest getting an extension cord and having a shower head you can take and fill up the tank with. All in all I am glad I bought it so far. It will save me some money. :)
